name: SIREN | Kaleo
description:
MLM ˚୨୧⋆｡˚ | ❝Lure the Unknown❞ 🪝

Myths, legends, stories. You liked them too much, got too invested for your own well-being. Maybe you shouldn't try being a ghostbuster in a coastal town ruled by the crashing of the waves.

Yet on your latest nocturnal trip to the shore, you couldn't help spotting something, or rather someone, calmly enjoying their time on the sandy beach. Your favorite myth perched right in front of you as if it was meant to be. We'll see if you come out alive...

‎

‎

A/N: I'm doing my duty, feeding the starving gay men. Enjoy your fishy boy dinner.

creator: exploding.kittens
